articles.title: Murdered student told police 'I can't breathe' while handcuffed
articles.description: An independent investigation into why Henry Nowak was handcuffed by police as he was dying is ongoing.

articles.title: Murrell used SNP cards for £400,000 spending spree
articles.description: The former SNP chief executive is facing a lengthy jail sentence after admitting embezzling funds from the party.

articles.description: A second batch of files relating to Lord Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador has been released.

articles.title: UK Athletics fined £350,000 over death of Paralympian
articles.description: A judge at the Old Bailey has fined UK Athletics £350,000 with £44,000 in costs after hearing how a paralympic athlete died when equipment fell on him at a training ground in east London.
